expanded_queries: What are common liquidity targets after a significant price swing?

final_chunks.section_title: TYPES OF ICT SILVER BULLET SETUPS AND DRAWS ON LIQUIDITY
final_chunks.text:
TYPES OF ICT SILVER BULLET SETUPS AND DRAWS ON LIQUIDITY
The framework for many ICT Silver Bullet setups involves identifying a 'draw on liquidity'. These are not Previous day high or low as a draw on liquidity: For a bullish scenario, price seeks buy stops above the previous day's high.
final_chunks.source: 2023 ICT Mentorship - ICT Silver Bullet Time Based Trading Model_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: DRAW ON LIQUIDITY & PD ARRAYS
final_chunks.text:
DRAW ON LIQUIDITY & PD ARRAYS
Inside this dealing range, we will look for the next draw on liquidity where price is likely to trade next. This could be an old high/low, a fair value gap, or a liquidity pool. The focus is a minimum of 500 Pips.
final_chunks.source: ICT Charter Price Action Model 4 Trade Plan & Algorithmic Theory_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: OPEN FLOAT AND SELL SIDE LIQUIDITY POOLS
final_chunks.text:
OPEN FLOAT AND SELL SIDE LIQUIDITY POOLS
When examining the sell side of liquidity, the open float includes: Protective sell stops placed by longs under the last bullish shift. Sell stops positioned below short-term lows, which can be weekly or monthly lows.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 05 - Open Float_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: DISCOUNT TO PREMIUM & LIQUIDITY VS. DELIVERY
final_chunks.text:
DISCOUNT TO PREMIUM & LIQUIDITY VS. DELIVERY
Bullish: Trading from discount to premium, riding the coat-tails of buy side delivery. Bearish: Trading from premium to discount, riding the coat-tails of sell side delivery.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - Market Maker Models_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: EXTERNAL RANGE LIQUIDITY
final_chunks.text:
EXTERNAL RANGE LIQUIDITY
External range liquidity is found outside the current trading range: Buy side liquidity is located above the Range High. Sell side liquidity is located below the Range Low. Runs on liquidity seek to pair orders with pending order liquidity, which forms a liquidity pool.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 04 - Reinforcing Liquidity Concepts & Price Delivery_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: REVIEW OF BEARISH FORECAST AND LIQUIDITY DRAW
final_chunks.text:
REVIEW OF BEARISH FORECAST AND LIQUIDITY DRAW
We previously outlined a bearish order block as an area to watch. Entering a seasonal tendency, we anticipated lower prices, which materialized. The relationship with the dollar indicated risk-off sentiment, leading to declines in equities.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 22_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: IDENTIFYING THE DRAW ON LIQUIDITY WITH TRADINGVIEW TOOLS
final_chunks.text:
IDENTIFYING THE DRAW ON LIQUIDITY WITH TRADINGVIEW TOOLS
Revisiting the E-mini S&P chart, the area of the relative equal low was outlined as the draw on liquidity.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 22_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: CONFIRMING THE DRAW ON LIQUIDITY AND ENTRY CHALLENGES
final_chunks.text:
CONFIRMING THE DRAW ON LIQUIDITY AND ENTRY CHALLENGES
The market did in fact trade down into our relative equal lows, which was the draw on liquidity. New students often prioritize learning how to pick the right order block and find the entry candle or entry point.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 22_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: LIQUIDITY DRIVEN MOVEMENT
final_chunks.text:
LIQUIDITY DRIVEN MOVEMENT
The entire setup and observed price action is fundamentally based on the liquidity resting below the previous day's low. It is crucial to understand that the Fibonacci tool itself is not the 'magic' or the reason why price is moving to these levels.
final_chunks.source: OTE Pattern Recognition Series - Vol. 05_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: TARGETS FOR SELL-SIDE LIQUIDITY
final_chunks.text:
TARGETS FOR SELL-SIDE LIQUIDITY
The market would go into a specific area but not trade to the top of a particular candle. Price would draw down into and beyond previously identified levels. Underneath the existing low and relative equal lows, there resides sell-side liquidity, which was a target.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 25_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.text:

Mapping out the morning's potential lows at 4072 (sell-side liquidity). This is an internal dialogue for mapping, not a definitive call. Upside is above the Old New Week Opening Gap High (not the present week's).

final_chunks.section_title: STAGE 1: PREPARATION
final_chunks.text:
STAGE 1: PREPARATION

final_chunks.section_title: LIQUIDITY HUNT
final_chunks.text:
LIQUIDITY HUNT
The objective was to see a specific low taken out. This area held 'buy-side' liquidity, which are buy stops typically targeted by breakout traders using trend lines. The strategy involved taking the buy-side first, then running the 'sell-side relative equal lows'.
final_chunks.source: 2023 ICT Mentorship - Review Of The Interactive Study 090123 NFP NQ Short_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: IMPORTANCE OF DRAWDOWN CONTROL FOR LONG-TERM GROWTH

IMPORTANCE OF DRAWDOWN CONTROL FOR LONG-TERM GROWTH

final_chunks.section_title: TARGETING THE NEW WEEK OPENING GAP EXTREMES
